hero.title: Special Care Management For Special Kids
hero.subtitle: A central hub to organize all essential care information for your special-needs child, accessible exactly when you need it.

featuresSection.title: Everything You Need In One Place
featuresSection.subtitle: Special Caring provides all the tools you need to manage care information for your special-needs child.

essentialInfo.title: Essential Information
essentialInfo.description: Store personal details, emergency contacts, and identification information securely.

medicalManagement.title: Medical Management
medicalManagement.description: Track medications, medical contacts, and healthcare appointments for your child.

specialNeeds.title: Special Needs Support
specialNeeds.description: Log specific requirements, therapies, and accommodations for your child's special needs.

dailyLogs.title: Daily Logs
dailyLogs.description: Record daily activities, behaviors, and important observations for continuity of care.

careTeam.title: Care Team Contacts
careTeam.description: Manage information for all caregivers, therapists, and family members involved in care.

celebrations.title: Celebrations
celebrations.description: Track your child's unique achievements - every milestone is a journey worth celebrating.

ctaSection.title: Ready to simplify your special caregiving journey?
ctaSection.subtitle: Join other special-needs families who have found relief through better care organization.

benefits.saveTime: Save time with easy information access
benefits.improveCare: Improve care coordination with all team members

footer.madeWith: Made with love for special-needs families
footer.description: A central hub for managing care information and tasks for special-needs children. Our platform ensures essential details are always at your fingertips.

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions below. If you need further assistance, don't hesitate to reach out.

addChild.q: How do I add a child profile?
addChild.a: After signing in, click the "Add Child" button on your dashboard. Fill in your child's name and any other details you'd like to track. You can always update this information later.

inviteCaregiver.q: How do I invite a caregiver to my child's profile?
inviteCaregiver.a: Go to your child's dashboard and open the Care Team section. Click "Invite Member," enter their email address, and choose a role (caregiver or viewer). They'll receive an invite code to join.

dataSecure.a: Yes. Sensitive fields like phone numbers, addresses, and medical information are encrypted at rest. Every table is protected with Row-Level Security policies so only authorized caregivers can access the data. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

exportData.a: Yes. You can export your child's care data in PDF, CSV, or JSON format from the relevant dashboard sections. Exported files contain only meaningful care information — internal system identifiers are stripped.

deleteAccount.q: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.a: Go to your Profile page and scroll to the bottom. Click "Delete Account" — this will permanently remove your account and all associated children profiles and care records. This action cannot be undone.

languages.a: Special Caring currently supports English (Canada), French (Canada), and Spanish. You can switch languages using the language selector in the navigation bar.

mobileApp.a: Special Caring is a progressive web app (PWA). You can add it to your phone's home screen from your browser for an app-like experience — no app store download required.

help.contactUs: Contact our support team and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
